name: Cornerstone Home Lending
description_short: Cornerstone Home Lending is a Dallas-based mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and various loan products through a team of experienced loan officers and mortgage professionals.
description_long:
Cornerstone Home Lending operates a Dallas, Texas office at 8333 Douglas Avenue Suite 550, serving homebuyers throughout the mortgage process. The company is accessible via their website at dallashouseloans.com and maintains a professional team of loan officers with NMLS credentials. The organization has established itself in the Dallas metropolitan area with multiple experienced mortgage professionals.

The company offers mortgage services including home purchase loans, refinancing, prequalification, and what they describe as a wide array of loan products. They provide in-house underwriting, convenient prequalification options, mobile and online accessibility, and personalized customer service. Clients can work directly with individual loan officers who each maintain their own contact information and team structures.

Cornerstone Home Lending distinguishes itself through the depth of experience among its loan officers. Gina Jackson, one of their top originators, has nearly $2 billion in career-total funding and over 25 years of experience, with recognition as a Five Star Mortgage Professional in Texas Monthly and Best of D in D Magazine. Multiple loan officers maintain their own websites and teams, suggesting established client bases and specialized service approaches. The company emphasizes personal attention, in-house underwriting, and commitment to understanding clients' short and long-term goals.

As a regional mortgage lender, Cornerstone Home Lending serves primarily the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex area based on their office location and loan officer profiles. The company competes in a crowded mortgage market and relies heavily on individual loan officer reputations rather than displaying company-wide certifications or national rankings. Pricing and rate competitiveness information is not available on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple experienced loan officers with 25+ years of industry experience and national recognition as Five Star professionals
Gina Jackson has nearly $2 billion in career-total funding and has helped over 5,000 families, demonstrating significant track record
In-house underwriting available, potentially reducing processing time and improving service control
Mobile and online accessibility plus convenient prequalification options for modern borrowers
Individual loan officers maintain dedicated teams and personal websites for specialized service
Wide array of loan products to choose from according to company materials
Recognition from industry publications (Texas Monthly, D Magazine) for loan officer excellence
cons: Limited geographic presence—Dallas office only, not a national lender with multiple locations
No rate information, APR comparisons, or pricing transparency available on website
Marketing heavily dependent on individual loan officer reputations rather than company brand strength
No information about loan programs offered (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, reverse mortgages, etc.)
Incomplete team member profiles on website (Victoria Todd's bio cuts off mid-sentence, suggesting outdated or poorly maintained content)
best_for: Dallas-Fort Worth area homebuyers seeking personalized service from experienced local mortgage professionals
Borrowers wanting to work directly with top-producing loan officers who have established track records with thousands of clients
Homebuyers who value individual attention and established relationships with mortgage professionals over national brand recognition
diagnosis: Cornerstone Home Lending is best for Dallas-Fort Worth homebuyers who value working with experienced, locally-established loan officers and want personalized service. The main caveat is that they appear to be a regional lender serving primarily the Dallas area rather than a national mortgage provider, and there is no publicly available pricing or rate information to compare against competitors.
services: Dedicated team support through individual loan officer teams
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1200 Westlake Ave N Suite 600 - Offices 1 & 2, Seattle, WA 98109
